// Debug utility to verify API configuration
export const debugApiConfig=()=>{const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'https://matrix-cv-backend.onrender.com/api';console.log('🔧 API Configuration Debug:');console.log('- REACT_APP_API_URL:',process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL);console.log('- Final API_BASE_URL:',API_BASE_URL);console.log('- Upload URL:',`${API_BASE_URL}/upload`);console.log('- Process URL:',`${API_BASE_URL}/process/[uploadId]`);console.log('- Health URL:',`${API_BASE_URL}/health`);return API_BASE_URL;};
